## 🚀 Featured Projects

<table width="100%">
  <tr>
    <td width="50%" valign="top">
      <h4>🛡️ Real-time WAF in Rust</h4>
      <p>A high-performance Web Application Firewall written in Rust. Features packet inspection, regex rule-based traffic filtering, real-time logging, and smooth Nginx integration.</p>
      <code>Rust</code> <code>Nginx</code> <code>Security</code>
    </td>
    <td width="50%" valign="top">
      <h4>📖 CyberSec Journey</h4>
      <p>A comprehensive repository documenting my cybersecurity learning track, covering network layouts, traffic capture, Linux administration, and active security challenge solutions.</p>
      <code>Markdown</code> <code>Networking</code> <code>Linux</code>
    </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td width="50%" valign="top">
      <h4>🚗 ANPR System</h4>
      <p>Automatic Number Plate Recognition system built with YOLO for vehicle/plate detection, OpenCV for image pre-processing, Tesseract OCR, and a clean Flask-based tracking dashboard.</p>
      <code>Python</code> <code>YOLO</code> <code>OpenCV</code> <code>Flask</code>
    </td>
    <td width="50%" valign="top">
      <h4>🌐 BGP Visualizer</h4>
      <p>An interactive Border Gateway Protocol tool to analyze network routing tables, path attributes, and visualize routing paths between Autonomous Systems.</p>
      <code>Python</code> <code>BGP</code> <code>Network-Graphs</code>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

### ⏳ Future Implementations
- **👾 Malware Sandbox**: A secure, isolated environment for dynamic malware analysis and API call logging.
- **📊 SIEM Lab**: Centralized log collection, normalization, and detection rule triggering dashboard.
- **🧠 AI Security Research**: Investigating adversarial perturbations, prompt injection defenses, and dataset poisoning.

---

## 🎯 Current Focus

- 🛠️ **Rust Security Tools** — Developing custom port scanners, packet sniffers, and automated auditing utilities.
- 🧠 **AI Security Research** — Examining security vulnerabilities in LLMs, ML models, and pipelines.
- 🔬 **Malware Analysis** — Deobfuscating executable payloads, reverse engineering PE/ELF structures.
- 📊 **SIEM Implementation** — Setting up detection metrics and telemetry pipelines.
- 🧬 **Reverse Engineering** — Studying system software vulnerabilities and binary analysis.

---

## 🛣️ Learning Roadmap

- [x] **Networking Fundamentals** (Routing protocols, Wireshark, packet analysis)
- [x] **Linux Systems** (Kernel basics, shell scripting, hardening)
- [x] **Python Scripting** (Automation, data analysis, ML pipelines)
- [/] **Rust Systems Programming** (Concurrency, memory safety, binary analysis)
- [/] **Web Application Exploitation** (OWASP Top 10, PortSwigger labs)
- [ ] **Malware Analysis & Reverse Engineering** (Ghidra, static/dynamic analysis)
- [ ] **Cloud Security** (Identity & Access Management, cloud network auditing)
- [ ] **Kernel Exploitation** (Privilege escalation, ROP chains)
- [ ] **OSCP Certification** (Offensive Security Certified Professional target)

---
